clear() - Method in interface com.rhlowery.acs.service.AccessRequestService
Resets the entire request store (primarily for testing).
clear() - Method in interface com.rhlowery.acs.service.CatalogService
Resets all provider states (primarily for testing).
clear() - Method in interface com.rhlowery.acs.service.IdentityProvider
Resets the provider state (for tests).
clear() - Method in class com.rhlowery.acs.service.impl.AbstractMockProvider
Clears all simulated policies.
clear() - Method in class com.rhlowery.acs.service.impl.DatabaseAccessRequestService
Resets the system by deleting all access requests.
clear() - Method in class com.rhlowery.acs.service.impl.DatabaseUserService
Clears all users and groups from the database.
clear() - Method in class com.rhlowery.acs.service.impl.DefaultCatalogService
 
clear() - Method in interface com.rhlowery.acs.service.UserService
Resets the user and group store (primarily for testing).

Verifies the existence and accessibility of a catalog node.
verifyPolicy(String, String, String, String) - Method in interface com.rhlowery.acs.service.CatalogService
Verifies if a specific policy is correctly applied at the provider level.
verifyPolicy(String, String, String, String) - Method in class com.rhlowery.acs.service.impl.DefaultCatalogService
Verifies if an access policy is correctly applied in the target system.
verifyRequest(String, SecurityContext) - Method in class com.rhlowery.acs.resource.AccessRequestResource
Verifies that the privileges of an approved request have actually been implemented in the target catalog provider (Drift Verification).
